business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate ownership and management; portfolio comprises office and mercantile/retail properties across Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake, TX

coverages_discussed.notes: Aggregate building value across 8 locations per current SOV; prior year aggregate building value was 159124688. Year-over-year increase of approximately 39.8%.
Aggregate contents value across 8 locations per current SOV; prior year aggregate contents value was 29928511. Year-over-year increase of approximately 11.7%.
Aggregate business income value across 8 locations per current SOV. BI was not tracked as a separate column in the prior year SOV.

positives: All 8 locations are equipped with automatic sprinkler systems
Predominantly superior construction: 5 of 8 locations are Fire Resistive; 2 of 8 are Masonry Non-Combustible; 1 of 8 is Non-Combustible
Relatively modern portfolio with construction years ranging from 1995 to 2018; 6 of 8 buildings built after 2000
All properties are commercial Class A office or retail/mercantile occupancies with no residential or habitational exposure
Geographic spread across five Texas metros: Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake
concerns: Total insured value (current Building + Contents only) increased approximately 35.3% year-over-year from 189053199 to 255772000, warranting appraisal substantiation
Modifications sheet confirms a mid-term TIV update for this insured via appraisal, signaling potential underinsurance in the expiring policy
Portfolio additions and deletions (new warehouse facility added, one location deleted due to expired lease) introduce mid-term exposure changes effective 2026-03-15
Highest single-location TIV concentration at LOC-001 Preston Center Tower (86450000), representing approximately 27.4% of total portfolio TIV
Three Houston locations (LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006) represent significant geographic concentration in a named-storm and flood-exposed market
LOC-006 Energy Corridor Business Center (built 1995) is the oldest building in the portfolio and carries Non-Combustible construction, the lowest-rated construction class in the portfolio
Newly added warehouse occupancy (from Modifications sheet) introduces a different risk profile not represented in the current Locations SOV
